description.value:
A curved cavalry blade designed to deliver slashing blows on the move. The scimitar rewards aggressive fighters who keep their momentum, hitting harder after closing distance.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d4, Slashing
BasicOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d6, Deflect, Riposte
MasterOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d6, Deflect, Riposte â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkIf you travel 20 ft or more before attacking (including while mounted), your next attack with this weapon deals an extra d8 damage.

rmeData.masterPerk: If you travel 20 ft or more before attacking (including while mounted), your next attack with this weapon deals an extra d8 damage.
